titleStmt.title: SII 6.952: original edition by K. V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 952. (A.R. No. 309-B of 1899). IN THE SAME PLACE.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śākē paṁcaśarō¨rvvicaṁdragaṇitē māsē nabhasyā(ṁ)hvayē śuklē pa¨rvvadinē mṛgēṁdraśikhariprōttuṁgaśṛṁgasthi[tēḥ .] dhīḥ pōt
phullapuṣpasrajaḥ svābhīṣṭā¨rtthakulābhivṛddhayaśasē vārē ravēḥ śrīpatēḥ (.) nāgēśvaraku jīyyananāmavān . 1 śrīsū¨ryya
paḍirāyasya tanayaḥ puṁṇyavāmmahān . ṣaṭbhiḥ niṣkaissamāpāḷya varadunāyakanā māḍadvayaṁ ca taṁ kṛtvā datva
naṁ punaḥ . tasyaiva kalpayāmāsa dha¨rmmamācaṁdratārakaṁ [. 2*] pratiprabhātaṁ nṛharēḥ majjanā¨rtthamayaṁ punaḥ sajalaṁ tāṁbrapātraṁ ca gaṁḍa
niṣkatrayaṁ dadau . 3 Appanasyōttamākhyasya jalānayanaka¨rmmaṇi . prava[¨r*]tatāmayaṁ dha¨rmmō yāvadācaṁdratārakaṁ . 4 svasti śrī . śakava¨rṣaṁbhulu
1155 gunēṇṭi Āṣāḍa punnamanāṁḍu sū¨ryyapaḍirāyu koḍku Eṟujīyyana tanaku puṇyamugā tirumāla catiṁpa varadunāyakuni nāyaka pra
sādakuṁcālu reṁḍu gaṁḍamāḍalu Aṟiṇṭiki ṭhāvupeṭṭi Ī māla peṭṭenu vīni kuḍu Uttama Appināyakuniki peṭṭina gaṁḍamāḍalu mācikitōnu
pānataṁbhakaḍuvayaṁdu nityamunnu tamaku puṇyamugā śrīnarasiṁhunāthuniki jalakalaśamulu tēṁgalāru . vīrē tamaku puṁṇyamu
gā śrīpatikhillāruni gōcarāna peṭṭina mōdālu nūṟu 100 nirutā pālu kuṁcālu 10 mu kuṁcālu Ēnu tecci rātridhupa
kālamaṁdu janmāṣṭami modalugā śrīnarasiṁhanāthuniki Āragiṁpa peṭṭiṁpagalāṁḍu [.] Ī Āragiṁcina pāla kuṁcalu 5 ṇṭikonagalavi
kaliṁgaparīkṣa naṁ ku 1 . tiruvaḍināyakuṁḍu ku 1 . UttamaĀppi nāyakuṁḍu ku 1 gā ku 3 A 1 bhōĪ Utya ku 1 . śrībhaṁ
śrīśrīśrī
Digital edition of SII 6.952 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
